name: Old Fashioned Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Gradually add milk to the dry ingredients, whisking until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a saucepan and heat over medium-high heat, stirring constantly.
4. Bring to a boil; continue boiling for 1 minute, stirring frequently.
5. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla.
6. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks.
7. Slowly add about 1 cup of the hot rice mixture into the beaten yolks.
8. Whisk this back into the saucepan containing the remaining mixture.
9. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the mixture begins to thicken and bubble slightly.
10. Serve warm or cold, plain or with your favorite topping.
Optional:
Add 1/2 cup Raisins, 1/2 cup Chopped Nuts, 1/2 cup Chopped Apples, or 1 teaspoon Cinnamon before final cooking.
